SourceProxy.label: SHYX Remesh With Endpoint
SourceProxy.name: SHYXRemeshWithEndpoint

Documentation.short_help: Threshold EndpointIndex < 0, then Vespa ICC remesh that patch only.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Uses **vtkThreshold** (interval on the first component) plus **vtkGeometryFilter** to extract the surface cells whose **first tuple component is strictly below zero** (default **EndpointIndex** from vtkCGALVesselEndClipper: caps positive, bulk **-1**). CGAL then remeshes **only that extracted patch** with the same Vespa ICC sizing as SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher. The filter output is **the remeshed patch alone**, not the full vessel; rejoin caps in ParaView if needed. No vtkSelection, no feature-angle detection, no feature mask. CGAL split/collapse/flip use defaults (all on); only protect / collapse / relax **constraints** are exposed besides sizing and iteration controls.

InputProperty.name: Input
InputProperty.Documentation: Vessel lumen surface with cell-centered scalars for endpoint tagging (picker lists cell arrays only so the default EndpointIndex resolves to cell data when a point array of the same name also exists).

StringVectorProperty.name: EndpointIndexArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Endpoint array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Cell-centered array on the input (same VTK input-array slot as other SHYX filters). Default: **EndpointIndex** on **Cell Data** (e.g. vtkCGALVesselEndClipper caps). The array list is restricted to cell arrays so ParaView does not pick a same-named point array by default when both exist. **vtkThreshold** keeps cells whose **first component** lies in (-1e200, -1e-9), i.e. strictly negative for typical integer tags (e.g. bulk **-1**).

IntVectorProperty.name: EndpointIndexAllScalars
IntVectorProperty.label: All corners negative (points)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When the array is point-centered: if ON, **vtkThreshold** requires every corner to satisfy the interval; if OFF, one corner is enough. Ignored for cell-centered arrays.

IntVectorProperty.name: LargestConnectedRegionOnly
IntVectorProperty.label: Largest connected region only
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), after extracting cells with **EndpointIndex** < 0, keep only the **largest** triangle-connected surface patch (**vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter**, largest region), then **vtkCleanPolyData** with **point merging off** removes vertices not used by any output triangle (no merging of geometrically coincident points); point lists then match the kept region only. Use when the thresholded side contains several disjoint pieces and you want the main bulk.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Min edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum edge length; must be > 0. BoundsDomain suggests 0.1% of the longest bbox edge.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum edge length; must be > Min edge length. BoundsDomain suggests 5% of bbox longest edge.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AdaptiveTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Adaptive tolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Vespa ICC adaptive sizing tolerance (same role as SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AdaptiveSizingNeighborMaxRatio
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Expansion ratio
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: **Expansion ratio** R caps ICC sizing jumps along edges; **≤ 1** disables. Set **0** to disable (same semantics as SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher).

IntVectorProperty.name: ScaleToRange
IntVectorProperty.label: Scale to range
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON, the computed per-vertex ICC sizing targets are linearly remapped so the actual minimum maps to **Min edge length** and the actual maximum maps to **Max edge length**. This stretches a clustering curvature distribution to always fill the full sizing interval. Default OFF (raw ICC values, clamped to [Min, Max] as usual).

IntVectorProperty.name: EnableWallRemesh
IntVectorProperty.label: Enable wall remesh
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), run CGAL isotropic remesh on the extracted wall patch; **Enable cap remesh** and wall iteration settings apply only when this is ON. When OFF, skip remesh and cap; output keeps the extracted geometry and adds point array **VespaSizeGlobal** (ICC target edge length per vertex, same as CGAL `v:vespa_size_global`) for visualization.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Remesh iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of CGAL isotropic_remeshing iterations on the negative patch.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRecomputeCurvatureEachIteration
IntVectorProperty.label: Recompute curvature each iteration
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), ICC is refreshed on the updated mesh before each iteration after the first.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfRelaxationSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Relaxation steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL vertex relocation steps per remesh iteration.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshProtectConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Protect constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL protect_constraints (default OFF). When ON, constrained edges are not split or collapsed.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshCollapseConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Collapse constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL collapse_constraints when protect is OFF.

IntVectorProperty.name: EnableCapRemesh
IntVectorProperty.label: Enable cap remesh
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default) and **Enable wall remesh** is ON, after wall remesh each open boundary loop is filled with **triangulate_refine_and_fair_hole** (FairingContinuity = 0, C0 only), then the filled cap patch is isotropic-remeshed with a uniform target edge length.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: CapExpansionRatio
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Cap expansion ratio
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Size multiplier per BFS hop from the seam into the cap interior. At each seam vertex the target size equals the average adjacent wall edge length; moving one hop inward multiplies that size by this ratio. **1.0** produces a uniform mesh matching the wall density; larger values give a progressively coarser mesh toward the cap centre. No curvature field is computed.

IntVectorProperty.name: CapNumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Cap remesh iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of CGAL isotropic_remeshing iterations on the filled cap patch.

IntVectorProperty.name: CapNumberOfRelaxationSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Cap relaxation steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL vertex relocation steps per cap remesh iteration.

IntVectorProperty.name: CapRemeshProtectConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Cap protect constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL protect_constraints for the cap remesh (default **ON**). The seam edges between the filled cap and the surrounding wall mesh are marked as constrained; with this ON they are never split or collapsed, keeping the cap stitched cleanly to the wall.

IntVectorProperty.name: CapRefineSizingField
IntVectorProperty.label: Recompute BFS each iteration
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), the BFS expansion field is recomputed from seam vertices **before each iteration after the first**. New vertices created in previous iterations receive sizes anchored to their actual hop-distance from the seam rather than accumulating interpolation drift. Costs one extra BFS pass per iteration; turn OFF for a faster path when interpolation drift is acceptable.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Transfer input arrays to output
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), point data is probed onto the output and cell data is mapped from the nearest input cell.
